title: Family Counseling * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Family Counseling * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Hispanic/Latino Community Immigration Issues Native American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF KINSHIP HOUSE OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health therapy and advocacy to children and their foster or adoptive families. Specialized child welfare assessments for parent-child interaction, siblings, and individual needs provided statewide. Offers professional training and community education, including workshops, support groups, and appropriate medical referrals. 1823 NE 8th Avenue Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Age 18 and younger who are in the foster care system or involved in the adoption process Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 460-2796 106 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KINSHIP HOUSE OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE
